original_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'spring%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1997-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1997-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'KENYA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH parts_filtered AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE 'spring%'
), lineitem_agg AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum_qty
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
)
SELECT s_name, s_address
FROM supplier
JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey AND n_name = 'KENYA'
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp
    INNER JOIN parts_filtered ON partsupp.ps_partkey = parts_filtered.p_partkey
    INNER JOIN lineitem_agg 
        ON partsupp.ps_partkey = lineitem_agg.l_partkey 
        AND partsupp.ps_suppkey = lineitem_agg.l_suppkey
    WHERE partsupp.ps_availqty > lineitem_agg.half_sum_qty
      AND partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
)
ORDER BY s_name;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced nested correlated subqueries with CTEs to precompute filtered parts and lineitem aggregates
Converted implicit joins to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimization
Changed IN clause to EXISTS for better performance with correlated subqueries
Moved filtering conditions to appropriate CTEs to reduce the amount of data processed in later stages
